name: trx_product_listings
description: Luxury resale product listings from a TheRealReal-style marketplace, including authentication status, pricing, and seller information.
businessContext: Powers the luxury resale marketplace product discovery and authentication workflow. Used by merchandising and authentication teams to track listing quality, pricing trends, and seller performance across premium brands.

name: fin_transactions
description: Financial transaction records from a digital payments platform including fraud scoring and processing details.

lineage.transformationQuery: SELECT t.*, o.customerEmail FROM raw_transactions t LEFT JOIN ecom_orders o ON t.customerId = o.customerId
lineage.description: Enriched from e-commerce order data for cross-platform customer matching

businessContext: Core transaction ledger for the digital payments platform. Feeds fraud detection ML models and financial reconciliation dashboards. Subject to PCI-DSS audit requirements with 90-day retention.

name: ecom_orders
description: E-commerce order records from an online retail marketplace including shipping, returns, and seller ratings.
businessContext: End-to-end order lifecycle data from the retail marketplace. Drives customer experience analytics, return rate monitoring, and seller quality scoring. Critical for quarterly business reviews.

name: hr_employees
description: Employee records from a large technology company HR system with compensation, performance, and employment status data.
businessContext: Comprehensive employee records powering workforce analytics, compensation benchmarking, and organizational planning. Highest sensitivity classification — restricted to HR leadership and approved analytics.

name: edu_students
description: Student enrollment and academic records from a university learning management system with financial aid data.
businessContext: Student enrollment and academic performance data from the university LMS. Supports retention analytics, financial aid optimization, and academic advising workflows. FERPA-protected.

name: health_appointments
description: Patient appointment and billing records from a multi-specialty healthcare network with insurance and diagnosis data.
businessContext: Patient appointment and billing records across the healthcare network. Powers clinical analytics, insurance reconciliation, and patient outcome tracking. HIPAA-protected with strict access controls.

name: inv_inventory
description: Warehouse inventory management records from a multi-facility distribution network with reorder and expiry tracking.
businessContext: Multi-facility inventory management data driving reorder automation, demand forecasting, and supply chain optimization. Real-time feeds from warehouse management systems across 8 distribution centers.

name: mktg_campaigns
description: Digital marketing campaign performance data across multiple channels including spend, impressions, and ROI metrics.

lineage.transformationQuery: SELECT c.*, SUM(o.totalAmount) as attributed_revenue FROM campaigns c JOIN ecom_orders o ON c.campaignId = o.discountCode JOIN streaming_events s ON o.customerId = s.userId GROUP BY c.campaignId
lineage.description: Attribution model joining campaign touchpoints with order conversions and streaming engagement

businessContext: Cross-channel marketing campaign performance data. Feeds ROI dashboards, budget allocation models, and A/B test analysis. Updated daily from ad platform APIs and attribution systems.

name: iot_sensor_readings
description: Industrial IoT sensor telemetry data from manufacturing facility monitoring systems with anomaly detection.
businessContext: Industrial IoT sensor telemetry from manufacturing monitoring systems. Powers predictive maintenance models, anomaly detection alerts, and equipment health dashboards. High-volume streaming ingestion.

name: real_estate_listings
description: Residential and commercial real estate listings from a multi-market brokerage platform with pricing and property details.

lineage.description: Property sensor data enrichment from IoT monitoring systems

businessContext: Multi-market real estate listing data from the brokerage platform. Supports comparative market analysis, pricing models, and agent performance tracking. Contains location-sensitive PII.

name: streaming_events
description: User streaming activity events from a video and podcast platform with viewing patterns and engagement data.
businessContext: User streaming behavior events from the content platform. Drives recommendation engine training, content performance analytics, and engagement optimization. Contains user identifiers requiring consent management.

name: crypto_trades
description: Cryptocurrency trading records from a multi-exchange aggregation platform with blockchain transaction data.

lineage.transformationQuery: SELECT ct.*, ft.fraudScore FROM crypto_trades ct LEFT JOIN fin_transactions ft ON ct.traderId = ft.customerId
lineage.description: Cross-referenced with financial transaction fraud scores

businessContext: Cryptocurrency trading records aggregated across multiple exchanges. Powers portfolio analytics, tax reporting, and compliance monitoring. Contains wallet addresses classified as PII under emerging regulations.
